views.about.title: About
views.about.description: Learn about the background, tech stack, and other information of this site.
views.about.background.title: Background
views.about.background.content: Arona's Cabin is a personal blog and tool site, providing various utilities and game gacha analysis features.
views.about.background.content2: This site aims to provide convenient online tools and game data analysis services. It adopts a frontend-backend separation architecture, with Vue 3 + TypeScript for frontend, Midway.js framework for backend, MongoDB for data storage, and Redis for caching and session management.
